title: Authentication Failures - Predictable Session
goal: Become admin by manipulating session ID.

whyVulnerable.explanation: The application used predictable session IDs. Attackers could guess valid sessions.
whyVulnerable.answer: Session IDs must be random and unguessable.

attackFlow.answer: Changing session=1001 to session=1000 gave admin access.

secureFix.explanation: Secure systems generate cryptographically random session tokens.
